channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $-2026-07-22
item.description: Order any Domino's pizza with any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) and up to 7 toppings for $9.99 online or in app — XL and Specialty pizzas excluded. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: Large Pizza Any 3 Toppings for $10
item.guid: Pizza Hut-Large Pizza Any 3 Toppings for $10-2026-07-22
item.description: Get any large Pizza Hut pizza with up to three toppings for $10 via the app or online. (Ongoing)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Choose three pieces of chicken, two sides, or a chicken sandwich from the $5 Faves Menu — no app required at participating locations. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Build your own combo — sandwich, fries, and drink — for $5 every day via the app or in-restaurant. (Ongoing)

item.title: McDonald's: App Exclusive Value Offers
item.description: Download the McDonald's app to access rotating daily coupons including BOGO Breakfast Sandwiches and $6 Combo Meal deals. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: $5.99 Footlong with Code FL599
item.description: Use promo code FL599 in the Subway app to get a Footlong for $5.99 — availability varies by zip code, so check your local store. (Limited time)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals — Combos from $4
item.description: Wendy's Biggie Deals offer full combos at $4, $6, and $8 price points every day — no app required. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: $7 Big Deal Meal
item.description: Sonic's new $7 Big Deal Meal bundles a burger or sandwich with fries and a drink at one everyday price — available at the drive-in or via app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sonic: $1.99 Value Menu Items
item.description: Sonic's refreshed $1.99 Menu features multiple food and drink items available all day every day. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu — All Day, All Night
item.guid: IHOP-$6 Value Menu — All Day, All Night-2026-07-22
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu is available around the clock at participating locations, making it a strong pick for late-night diners. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: The Clock's Off Menu — New All-Day Dishes
item.guid: Denny's-The Clock's Off Menu — New All-Day D-2026-07-22
item.description: Denny's new The Clock's Off Menu brings fresh breakfast, lunch, and dinner options available 24 hours at participating locations nationwide. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: Value Menu Bean and Cheese Burritos Under $2
item.guid: Del Taco-Value Menu Bean and Cheese Burritos Unde-2026-07-22
item.description: Del Taco's Value Menu regularly features Bean and Cheese Burritos for under $2 — a late-night budget staple available at most locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Get 20 Boneless Wings in up to four flavors plus a large fry and two dipping sauces for $16.99 via Wingstop.com or the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Chick-fil-A: 2026 Summer Menu — Peach Milkshake Returns
item.guid: Chick-fil-A-2026 Summer Menu — Peach Milkshake Retur-2026-07-22
item.description: Chick-fil-A's limited-time Peach Milkshake is back for summer 2026 — order via the free Chick-fil-A One app or in-store (free account helpful for ordering ahead). (Limited time)
